programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: The three finalists compete in three tough challenges set by Savile Row's Patrick Grant and sewing expert May Martin who must decide who will take the title of Britain's best amateur sewer. The first test is to follow a pattern for a man's shirt. The judges are looking for perfect top stitching with no pleats or puckers but the complicated challenge drives one sewer to tears. In the second challenge they have to show off their hand sewing skills, decorating an evening bag, and for the finale they are asked to create the most demanding garment so far - a stunning made-to-measure evening dress in a luxury fabric. The finalists are in for a surprise when they see who their models are.

programme.title: Location Location Location
programme.desc: Phil is searching for pilot James and his wife, Mairead, who have only just moved to Liverpool and are struggling with where to buy their forever family home because they don't know the area. With a generous 600,000-pounds budget, it's still a tall order for Phil, who must keep the search within a strict 30-minute radius of Liverpool airport for James' commute to work and, with their first child on the way, the pressure's on Phil to find the perfect family home in the perfect location. Across the city, Kirstie has a task and a half on her hands as she takes fledgling househunters Laura and Andy under her wing as they begin their search having never viewed a single property before. This engaged couple have been living at Andy's parents' house to save for a deposit and are now desperate to find their own place, but it soon becomes apparent that Laura and Andy want quite different things from their first home. Can Kirstie find them the home that gives them both what they want in the time she's got?

programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil help Louise and Johnny find a family-friendly pad in Weybridge, and Ros and Alex who want a countryside home.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location Australia
programme.desc: Bryce and Veronica are helping two sets of house hunters in one of Australia's most expensive real estate markets. But matching wallets and wish lists is proving difficult, maybe it's time for a reality check!

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: We've all dreamed of living the good life: fresh country air and the great outdoors, but how about your own slice of the country in suburban Sydney? Well, that's exactly what Andrew and Erika Coombe set out to achieve. They bought their overgrown bush block, complete with a rambling country-style home 10 years ago in smart, suburban West Ryde and have cherished its rustic charm. But now with two young boys and one on the way, the Coombes want to make a move to the country full-time. Unfortunately, your average Sydney buyer doesn't share their love of all things overgrown and if they are brave enough to fight through the garden to the house, they're greeted with a 1950s time warp, dark wood panelling and cluttered rooms. It's enough to send any buyer running, and that's before they've seen the price tag - almost a million dollars.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Robyn's been trying to sell for three long years in the worst market the Gold Coast has seen in decades. With debts mounting she desperately needs the help of Andrew, Charlie and Shaynna to sell up, break even and start again.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Kathy and Eugene have lived in their Loftus home for 33 years, expanding the original 1950s cottage to accommodate their four boys until it became a mismatched five-bedroom house.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: From deep underground, to high on a bushfire-prone mountain top, Grand Designs Series 10B is a testament to the lengths, depths and heights some of Australia's most ambitious and passionate home owners will strive for to realise their dreams. From shipping containers, to dugouts, a 100 year old hat factory, to a solid concrete bunker, this season sees homeowners push the limits in their quest to find clever design solutions in some of the most extreme environments on the planet. From the soaring temperatures of Coober Pedy, to the windswept coastline of South Australia's Fleurieu Peninsula; the surfer paradise of Torquay, Victoria, to Sydney's bustling inner city hotspot of Newtown; host Peter Maddison goes on a journey of discovery, surprise and some trepidation with some of Australia's boldest architectural trailblazers. Astounding designs, innovative materials, inspired solutions in some of the best locations in the country. Grand Designs Australia Series 10 - you haven't seen anything like it.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and a small team of experts meet a remarkable group of British survivors whose lives were shattered by the events of World War II. The Foreign and Commonwealth Office hosts a special gathering as Jewish families come together to talk, many for the first time on television, about life under Hitler's tyranny.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Eric Knowles heads to Detling with experts Catherine Southon and Mark Stacey. He visits Maidstone Museum to see rare ceramics offering insight into Japanese philosophy.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.sub-title: You're All I Need To Get By
programme.desc: Paul, 66, has a dangerously high heart rate. Nicky, 48, has come to A&E with swelling in her throat. Seven-year-old Kit is in paediatric A&E after injuring his chest while on holiday.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: People bring prized possessions for evaluation and pricing.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Eric Knowles oversees proceedings from the National Botanic Garden of Wales in Carmarthen. Kate Bliss and Ben Cooper guide the reds and blues.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Long Lost Family

programme.title: Escape to the Country

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Kathy and Eugene have lived in their Loftus home for 33 years, expanding the original 1950s cottage to accommodate their four boys until it became a mismatched five-bedroom house.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman helps couple chasing fresh air and freedom on sunny adventure in Kent countryside, featuring medieval mystery house and fabulous flower farm.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team visit Burton Constable Hall near Hull. Objects inspected by Fiona Bruce and the experts include the first transatlantic airmail letter, brought on the plane piloted by Alcock and Brown in 1919, uncomfortable diaries of an SS officer imprisoned in Britain in World War II, and letters from the founder of modern nursing, Florence Nightingale. The award for most curious acquisition of the day must go to a bronze figure which was swapped for fish and chip suppers. One family bring in 1500 shoe buckles obsessively collected by a late husband. His investment proves to be a wise decision, however, when expert Judith Miller delivers the valuation.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion tries her hand at blacksmithing while experts Stephanie Connell and Roo Irvine help teams chase profit in Peterborough.

programme.title: Better Homes & Gardens
programme.desc: Homes and gardens come alive in this lifestyle show packed full of ideas and information.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Jason and Jennifer's derelict cottage was left frozen in time. They plan to restore it and add an industrial structure that will contrast the heritage frontage, but can they find a balance between the two?

programme.title: Location Location Location
programme.desc: Kirstie helps sisters Gemma and Lucy find a home in costly Berkshire, while Phil helps newlyweds Hannah and Hassan find a four-bedder in Buckinghamshire. The average house prices in the Home Counties are around 800,000 pounds. Having viewed almost 40 properties without success, Hannah and Hassan are still chasing a four-bedroom house in the pricey towns around High Wycombe. The fact that Hassan wants space for a full-size snooker table isn't helping. In Reading, Kirstie teams up with sisters Gemma and Lucy, who insist on two of everything: two bedrooms, two bathrooms and two parking spaces.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Newlyweds Tamara and Stef want to add to their family. Will their two-bedroom townhouse be transformed into a suitable family home or will Andrew find them a new little nest?

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Sonali Shah is property hunting with a couple who have a 450,000-pounds budget, and hopes that this move will transport them to a village with community spirit and a complete change of scenery.

programme.desc: When the girl of his dreams gets kidnapped, a man turns his inability to feel pain into an unexpected advantage as he fights a bunch of thugs to get her back.

programme.title: Kraven the Hunter

programme.desc: Free-spirited Rickey, clinging to his Peter Pan ways, convinces his settled friend Glenn to pause domestic life for an unplanned road trip across California.

programme.desc: During the COVID-19 pandemic, a standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbour is pitted against neighbour in Eddington, N.M.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: In Oz, two clashing witches, Elphaba and Glinda, form an unlikely friendship. Elphaba, wrongly labeled wicked, seeks to expose the corrupt Wizard ruling the land.

programme.title: Kissing Is The Easy Part
programme.desc: Sean, a top student, agrees to tutor rebellious Flora for a college recommendation letter. Their growing attraction complicates more than just their academic goals.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth
programme.desc: Zora Bennett leads a team to a deadly island lab to retrieve dinosaur DNA with life-saving potential, but they uncover a shocking secret buried for decades.

programme.desc: Blake and his family barricade themselves in a farmhouse after an unseen creature attacks. As the night unfolds, Blake transforms into a dangerous being, threatening his wife and daughter.

programme.desc: Friends find themselves on a dangerous path as they try to cover up the death of an innocent man.

programme.title: Shoshana
programme.desc: Two British police officers Thomas Wilkin and Geoffrey Morton in their hunt for charismatic poet and Zionist freedom fighter Avraham Stern, who was plotting to evict British authorities.

programme.title: M3gan 2.0
programme.desc: Two years after M3GAN's rampage, Gemma must revive her creation to stop Emilia, a rogue military AI growing too self-aware to control.

programme.desc: When Zephyr, a free-spirited surfer, is abducted by a shark-obsessed serial killer and held captive on his boat, she must figure out how to escape before he carries out a ritualistic feeding to the sharks below.

programme.desc: Two sisters go diving at a remote location. One of the sisters is struck, leaving her trapped 28 meters below. With low levels of oxygen and it is up to her sister to save her life.

programme.title: The Idaho Student Murders
programme.desc: Explores the real - life horror that occurred in the idyllic town of Moscow, Idaho, where criminology student Bryan Kohberger faced four first-degree murder charges and the death penalty for the murder of four University students.

programme.desc: Filmmaker Kathryn Ferguson explores the remarkable life and legacy of Hollywood legend and cultural icon Humphrey Bogart, narrated in his own words.

programme.desc: A masked maniac with glowing red eyes returns each Valentine's Day to kill couples. An ad exec and her romantic colleague become targets and vow to stop the terror.

programme.title: The Friend
programme.desc: A solitary writer adopts her late friend's Great Dane and, through their bond, starts to come to terms with her past and reconnect with her creative self.

programme.title: The Ballad Of Wallis Island
programme.desc: Old tensions resurface when former bandmates who were former lovers reunite for a private show at the island home of an eccentric millionaire.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
programme.desc: After jumping back into the dating pool, single mother Bridget Jones finds herself caught between a younger man and her son's science teacher.

programme.title: The Beast Within
programme.desc: After witnessing her father undergo a terrible transformation, a 10-year-old girl becomes ensnared by the dark ancestral secret that her parents have so desperately tried to conceal.

programme.title: Love & Rage: Munroe Bergdorf
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Munroe Bergdorf - author, model, and leading transgender activist.

programme.title: Funny Birds
programme.desc: Thrown together under tragic circumstances, three generations of women from the same family are forced to learn to live together on a small rural chicken farm in New Jersey.

programme.title: The Phoenician Scheme
programme.desc: Wealthy tycoon Zsa-zsa Korda names his nun daughter sole heir. As he starts a new venture, they face threats from scheming rivals, terrorists, and assassins.

programme.title: Reagan
programme.desc: From the glitter of Hollywood to the world stage, Ronald Reagan overcomes the odds to become the 40th president of the United States.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: For the third time, Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to Beverly Hills, this time to track down bad guys at an amusement park.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: Dr Sherman Klump, a kind, calorically challenged genetics professor who longs to shed his 400-pound frame in order to win the heart of the beautiful Carla Purty. So, with one swig of his experimental fat-reducing serum, Sherman becomes Buddy Love, a fast-talking, pumped up, plumped-down Don Juan. Can Sherman stop his buff alter ego before it's too late, or will Buddy have the last laugh?

programme.title: The Nutty Professor II: The Klumps
programme.desc: America's funniest family back for seconds! Eddie Murphy is hilarious when he stars as the entire Klump family in this enormous comedy blockbuster. The hilarity begins when professor Sherman Klump finds romance with fellow DNA specialist, Denise Gaines, and discovers a brilliant formula that reverses ageing. But Sherman's thin and obnoxious alter ego, Buddy Love, wants out and a big piece of the action. And when Buddy gets loose, things get seriously nutty. Now, it's up to Mama, Papa, Ernie and Granny Klump to throw their weight around and save the day in this whopping, gut-busting comedy.

programme.title: Boomerang
programme.desc: A successful executive and womaniser finds his lifestyle choices have turned back on him when his new female boss turns out to be an even bigger deviant than he is.

programme.title: Bowfinger
programme.desc: How does Bobby Bowfinger, Hollywood's least successful director, get Kit Ramsey, Hollywood's biggest star, in his ultra low-budget film? Any way he can. With an ingenious scheme and the help of Kit's eager and nerdy brother Jiff, an ambitious and sexy wannabe and an over-the-hill diva, Bowfinger sets out to trick Kit Ramsey into the performance of a lifetime.

programme.title: Coming to America
programme.desc: Join an African Prince on an unforgettable comic quest to the New World, it's time for him to find a princess... and the mission leads him and his most loyal friends to Queens, New York. In disguise as an impoverished immigrant, the pampered prince quickly finds himself a new job, new friends, new digs, new enemies and lots of trouble.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: A tough Detroit cop is treading on toes in posh Beverly Hills whilst trying to track down a killer who murdered his good friend. Foley's not-quite-by-the-book way of doing things doesn't go down well with the local authorities or the bad guys. Detectives Rosewood and Taggart are ordered to follow Foley and ensure he doesn't get in any trouble, but it's Foley who shows them a thing or two about sneaky detective work.

programme.title: Shrek Forever After
programme.desc: In the final chapter of this popular animation franchise, Mike Myers voices Shrek, who is not scaring villagers away like he used to, but now agrees to autograph pitch forks. Longing for the days when he felt like a real ogre, Shrek is duped into signing a pact with the smooth-talking deal-maker, Rumpelstiltskin (Walt Dohrn). Shrek now finds himself in a twisted, alternate version of Far Far Away, where ogres are hunted, Rumpelstiltskin is king and Shrek and Fiona (Cameron Diaz) have never met. Shrek must undo all he's done in the hope of saving his friends, restoring his world and reclaiming his one true love.

programme.desc: Eddie Murphy and Jeff Garlin put their parenting skills to the test in this hilarious caper about two sacked admen and newly stay-at-home dads who open their own day-care centre.

programme.title: Boomerang
programme.desc: A successful executive and womaniser finds his lifestyle choices have turned back on him when his new female boss turns out to be an even bigger deviant than he is.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: Axel Foley turns up the heat when the street-wise cop leads sidekick Judge Reinhold on the trail of a weapons kingpin and his leather-clad hit-lady.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: For the third time, Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to Beverly Hills, this time to track down bad guys at an amusement park.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor II: The Klumps
programme.desc: America's funniest family back for seconds! Eddie Murphy is hilarious when he stars as the entire Klump family in this enormous comedy blockbuster. The hilarity begins when professor Sherman Klump finds romance with fellow DNA specialist, Denise Gaines, and discovers a brilliant formula that reverses ageing. But Sherman's thin and obnoxious alter ego, Buddy Love, wants out and a big piece of the action. And when Buddy gets loose, things get seriously nutty. Now, it's up to Mama, Papa, Ernie and Granny Klump to throw their weight around and save the day in this whopping, gut-busting comedy.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Eddie Murphy and Jeff Garlin put their parenting skills to the test in this hilarious caper about two sacked admen and newly stay-at-home dads who open their own day-care centre.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: A tough Detroit cop is treading on toes in posh Beverly Hills whilst trying to track down a killer who murdered his good friend. Foley's not-quite-by-the-book way of doing things doesn't go down well with the local authorities or the bad guys. Detectives Rosewood and Taggart are ordered to follow Foley and ensure he doesn't get in any trouble, but it's Foley who shows them a thing or two about sneaky detective work.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: Dr Sherman Klump, a kind, calorically challenged genetics professor who longs to shed his 400-pound frame in order to win the heart of the beautiful Carla Purty. So, with one swig of his experimental fat-reducing serum, Sherman becomes Buddy Love, a fast-talking, pumped up, plumped-down Don Juan. Can Sherman stop his buff alter ego before it's too late, or will Buddy have the last laugh?

programme.title: The Nutty Professor II: The Klumps
programme.desc: America's funniest family back for seconds! Eddie Murphy is hilarious when he stars as the entire Klump family in this enormous comedy blockbuster. programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Happily ever after will have to wait as Shrek, Princess Fiona, and Donkey visit the in-laws. Outraged that Fiona has wed an ogre, the King hires hit man Puss in Boots to make the problem disappear.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Dad-to-be Shrek and his posse embark on a new, trouble-filled adventure, in search of their next king. Another fun family romp.

programme.title: Shrek Forever After
programme.desc: In the final chapter of this popular animation franchise, Mike Myers voices Shrek, who is not scaring villagers away like he used to, but now agrees to autograph pitch forks. Longing for the days when he felt like a real ogre, Shrek is duped into signing a pact with the smooth-talking deal-maker, Rumpelstiltskin (Walt Dohrn). Shrek now finds himself in a twisted, alternate version of Far Far Away, where ogres are hunted, Rumpelstiltskin is king and Shrek and Fiona (Cameron Diaz) have never met. Shrek must undo all he's done in the hope of saving his friends, restoring his world and reclaiming his one true love.

programme.title: Bowfinger
programme.desc: How does Bobby Bowfinger, Hollywood's least successful director, get Kit Ramsey, Hollywood's biggest star, in his ultra low-budget film? Any way he can. With an ingenious scheme and the help of Kit's eager and nerdy brother Jiff, an ambitious and sexy wannabe and an over-the-hill diva, Bowfinger sets out to trick Kit Ramsey into the performance of a lifetime.

programme.title: Coming to America

programme.title: Boomerang
programme.desc: A successful executive and womaniser finds his lifestyle choices have turned back on him when his new female boss turns out to be an even bigger deviant than he is.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Captain Underpants: The First Epic Movie
programme.desc: George and Harold are fourth-grade BFFs who love dreaming up funny pranks. One day, they accidentally hypnotise their principal into believing he's a dimwitted hero named Captain Underpants. But when the new schoolteacher turns out to be a disgraced scientist bent on ridding the world of laughter, George, Harold and Captain Underpants must band together to stop his evil agenda.

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: Dog Man, part dog, part man, is on a mission to protect and serve while chasing down the feline supervillain, Petey the Cat.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 3
programme.desc: Sonic, Knuckles, and Tails face Shadow, a powerful new foe. Outmatched, they form an unexpected alliance to stop him and protect the planet.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: The untold origin story of Optimus Prime and Megatron, better known as sworn enemies, but who once were friends bonded like brothers.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: A trio of university parapsychologists lose their research grant and decide to open their own business, Ghostbusters, and almost at once are summoned to investigate the strange happenings in a Central Park West apartment. What they discover is that all Manhattan is being besieged by otherworldly demons.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: Forced into slavery by the corrupt heir to the throne, Roman general Maximus becomes a gladiator. His prowess in the arena leads him to Rome, the Colosseum, and a showdown with the new emperor.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The greatest adventure of all time begins with a young crew's maiden voyage on board the most advanced starship ever created: the USS Enterprise. In the midst of an incredible journey full of optimism, intrigue, comedy and cosmic peril, the new recruits must find a way to stop an evil being whose mission of vengeance threatens all of mankind. The fate of the galaxy rests in the hands of bitter rivals born worlds apart.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: The year is 1936, Indiana Jones hears from a museum curator named Marcus Brody about a biblical artefact called The Ark of the Covenant, which can hold the key to humanly existence. Joined with Marion Ravenwood and Sallah, Jones ventures to vast places such as Nepal and Egypt to find this artefact. He will have to fight his enemy Belloq and a band of Nazis for the Lost Ark.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: After being captured by Turks during the Crusades, Robin of Locksley and a Moor, Azeem, escape back to England where Azeem vows to remain until he repays Robin for saving his life. Meanwhile, Robin's father has been murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham and when Robin returns home he vows to avenge his father's death. Even though Marian, his childhood friend, cannot help him, he escapes to the Forest of Sherwood where he joins a band of exiled villagers and becomes their leader. With their help he attempts to cleanse the land of the evil that the Sheriff has spread.

programme.title: The Woman King
programme.desc: This is the remarkable story of the Agojie, the all-female unit of warriors who protected the African Kingdom of Dahomey in the 1800s with skills and a fierceness unlike anything the world has ever seen. Inspired by true events, "The Woman King" follows the emotionally epic journey of General Nanisca as she trains the next generation of recruits and readies them for battle against an enemy determined to destroy their way of life. Some things are worth fighting for.

programme.title: Watchmen: Chapter I
programme.desc: In an alternate world, the murder of a government sponsored superhero draws his outlawed colleagues out of retirement, into a mystery that threatens their lives and the world itself.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: For centuries, two races of robotic aliens have waged a war with the fate of the universe at stake. When the battle comes to Earth, all that stands between the evil Decepticons and ultimate power is a clue held by a young teenager, Sam. Unaware that he alone is mankind's last chance for survival, Sam finds himself in a struggle between the Autobots and Decepticons with the world hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Clumsy and overweight panda, Po, dreams of becoming a kung fu master.

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: In a happy suburban neighbourhood surrounded by white picket fences and flowering rose bushes sits a black house with a dead lawn. Unbeknownst to the neighbours, hidden deep beneath this home is a vast secret hideout belonging to Gru, a dastardly villain who, along with the help of his many little minions, is planning the biggest heist in the history of the world: he's going to steal the moon!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: The city needs heroes. Darkness has settled over New York City as Shredder and his evil Foot Clan have an iron grip on everything from the police to the politicians. The future is grim until four unlikely outcast brothers rise from the sewers and discover their destiny as Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles. The Turtles must work with fearless reporter April O'Neil and her wise-cracking cameraman Vern Fenwick to save the city and unravel Shredder's diabolical plan.

programme.title: Serendipity
programme.desc: In the course of one magical evening, Jonathan and Sara meet unexpectedly, but part when she decides that fate must determine their future. Years later, they are both engaged to others, but cannot give up the dream that - despite the time, distance and obstacles that conspire to keep them apart - they will one day meet again.

programme.title: Matchmaker Mysteries: A Fatal Romance
programme.desc: When a romance writer is murdered, matchmaker Angie Dove and Detective Kyle Cooper must read between the lines to find the killer.

programme.title: Marrying Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: Since Elizabeth, who is a down-to-earth high school teacher, and Donovan, a reserved New York businessman, are so different, their trip to the altar is lively and unpredictable.

programme.title: The Princess and the Marine
programme.desc: Based on a true story about a US marine stationed in Bahrain who falls in love with a member of the Bahrain royal family.

programme.title: Mickey Blue Eyes
programme.desc: He walks the wawk. He talks the tawk. Noo Yawk is about to encounter a most unlikely mobster. At the centre of this lively fish-out-of-water comedy romp is a dapper Manhattan art auctioneer named Michael Felgate. Eager to marry Gina, the lovely teacher he's been dating for three months, Michael feels it's time he meet her family. What he meets is the family. Gina's father Frank is a gangster a "juicer" who extracts money for the mob. Now the squeeze is on Michael to use the auction house as a money-laundering scam for dubious artwork plunging fumbling, bumbling Michael into a world where he must pose as a notorious wise guy called Mickey Blue Eyes. You'll call him hilarious.

programme.title: America's Sweethearts
programme.desc: Gwen and Eddie are 'America's Sweethearts' - the country's favourite couple, on-screen and off, but when their very public romance turns into a very private break-up, only veteran press agent Lee and Gwen's assistant, Kiki, can help Gwen and Eddie show some love while they promote their last film together. The press junket is in a resort hotel miles from anywhere, and while Lee and Kiki frantically try to keep the media away from the real story - and keep Gwen and Eddie from revealing their secret - Kiki finds something entirely unexpected.

programme.title: Mona Lisa Smile
programme.desc: A funny, inspiring and uplifting film about an art history professor with a lot to teach about life and much to learn about romance.

programme.title: Serendipity
programme.desc: In the course of one magical evening, Jonathan and Sara meet unexpectedly, but part when she decides that fate must determine their future. Years later, they are both engaged to others, but cannot give up the dream that - despite the time, distance and obstacles that conspire to keep them apart - they will one day meet again.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Annie's life is a mess. But when she finds out her lifetime best friend is engaged, she simply must serve as Lillian's maid of honour. Though lovelorn and broke, Annie bluffs her way through the expensive and bizarre rituals. With one chance to get it perfect, she'll show Lillian and her bridesmaids just how far you'll go for someone you love.

programme.title: Matchmaker Mysteries: A Fatal Romance
programme.desc: When a romance writer is murdered, matchmaker Angie Dove and Detective Kyle Cooper must read between the lines to find the killer.

programme.title: Marrying Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: Since Elizabeth, who is a down-to-earth high school teacher, and Donovan, a reserved New York businessman, are so different, their trip to the altar is lively and unpredictable.

You'll call him hilarious.

programme.title: America's Sweethearts

The press junket is in a resort hotel miles from anywhere, and while Lee and Kiki frantically try to keep the media away from the real story - and keep Gwen and Eddie from revealing their secret - Kiki finds something entirely unexpected.

programme.title: Mona Lisa Smile
programme.desc: A funny, inspiring and uplifting film about an art history professor with a lot to teach about life and much to learn about romance.

programme.title: Jane Eyre
programme.desc: Based on Charlotte Bronte's classic novel, Mia Wasikowska stars as Jane Eyre in this adaptation of the story of a former orphan who now works as a governess for the wealthy and moody landowner, Mr. Rochester (Michael Fassbender). The isolated and imposing residence and Mr. Rochester's coldness have sorely tested the young woman's resilience, but as Jane reflects upon her past and recovers her natural curiosity, she will learn more of Mr. Rochester and the terrible secret that he is hiding.

programme.title: Emma.
programme.desc: Jane Austen's beloved comedy about finding your equal and earning your happy ending is reimagined in this delicious film adaptation.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Jo March reflects back and forth on her life, telling the beloved story of the March sisters - four young women, each determined to live life on her own terms.

programme.title: Only You
programme.desc: An incurable romantic throws caution to the wind and goes to Italy in search of an elusive soul mate. Faith has waited all her life to meet Damon Bradley, the name given as her eventual soul mate both by her ouija board, at age 11, and a carnival fortune teller. Now, just days before her marriage, Faith receives a call from her fiance's old friend, Damon Bradley, who phones with best wishes on his way to Venice, Italy. Determined to get at least a glimpse of the man before her wedding she grabs Kate, her best friend and takes the next plane to Italy. There, she bumps instead into Peter, who instantly knows Faith is his soul mate, now all he has to do is convince her.

programme.title: Wedding Wars
programme.desc: In the midst of organising his brother Ben's wedding, Shel, a gay party planner, decides to go on strike for equal rights when he learns that Ben is behind a political speech against gay marriage.

programme.title: The Wedding Banquet
programme.desc: To stay in the country, a gay man offers to fund his friend's IVF if she marries him. Chaos ensues when his grandmother plans a lavish Korean wedding banquet.

programme.title: Jane Eyre
programme.desc: Based on Charlotte Bronte's classic novel, Mia Wasikowska stars as Jane Eyre in this adaptation of the story of a former orphan who now works as a governess for the wealthy and moody landowner, Mr. Rochester (Michael Fassbender). The isolated and imposing residence and Mr. Rochester's coldness have sorely tested the young woman's resilience, but as Jane reflects upon her past and recovers her natural curiosity, she will learn more of Mr. Rochester and the terrible secret that he is hiding.

programme.title: Emma.
programme.desc: Jane Austen's beloved comedy about finding your equal and earning your happy ending is reimagined in this delicious film adaptation.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Jo March reflects back and forth on her life, telling the beloved story of the March sisters - four young women, each determined to live life on her own terms.

programme.title: Only You
programme.desc: An incurable romantic throws caution to the wind and goes to Italy in search of an elusive soul mate. Faith has waited all her life to meet Damon Bradley, the name given as her eventual soul mate both by her ouija board, at age 11, and a carnival fortune teller. Now, just days before her marriage, Faith receives a call from her fiance's old friend, Damon Bradley, who phones with best wishes on his way to Venice, Italy. Determined to get at least a glimpse of the man before her wedding she grabs Kate, her best friend and takes the next plane to Italy. There, she bumps instead into Peter, who instantly knows Faith is his soul mate, now all he has to do is convince her.

programme.title: Wedding Wars
programme.desc: In the midst of organising his brother Ben's wedding, Shel, a gay party planner, decides to go on strike for equal rights when he learns that Ben is behind a political speech against gay marriage.

programme.title: The Wedding Banquet
programme.desc: To stay in the country, a gay man offers to fund his friend's IVF if she marries him. Chaos ensues when his grandmother plans a lavish Korean wedding banquet.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Sophie has just one wish to make her wedding perfect: to have her father walk her down the aisle. Now she just has to find out who he is. Join the music, laughter and fun of the irresistibly charming musical celebration of mothers, daughters and fathers, and true loves lost and new ones found. Based on the Broadway smash-hit and filled with the ABBA songs you know and love, it's the feel-good experience that will have you singing and dancing over and over again.

programme.title: Steel Magnolias
programme.desc: In this poignant and often hilarious film a wedding is about to take place in Chinquapin, Louisiana. Bride Shelby is a headstrong young beauty whose iron-willed mother, M'Lynn, would do anything for her. Giant-haired Dolly Parton is Truvy, the owner of the beauty parlour that serves as the town's unofficial hub. Dropping in to exchange gossip are Ouiser, the richest and meanest woman in town, and Clairee, an elegant widow with a sly delivery. The atmosphere is further enlivened by the wacky new girl, Annelle, a gawky trainee with cat-woman glasses and a mysterious past. These six 'steel magnolias' huddle together and provide each other with strength, friendship and an audience for each other's jokes as they negotiate the ups and downs of life and love in a small Southern town.

programme.title: Shirley Valentine
programme.desc: Shirley Valentine, a wisecracking, completely unpredictable English housewife who proves it's never too late to recapture your dreams. Bored with her suburban life, Shirley takes a chance on adventure when her friend invites her on a vacation to Greece. Within no time she's back to her rebellious teenage roots, saying yes to a wild fling with a handsome rogue and the life she's always wanted.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Adam Sandler and Drew Barrymore reunite again since starring in THE WEDDING SINGER. Henry lives an enviable life in a Hawaiian paradise, spending every night with a beautiful tourist in search of an island fling. It's a sweet life with no strings attached, until he meets Lucy. He and Lucy hit it off from the get-go, but the next day she acts like she doesn't know him. Has his karma come around to kick him in the butt or what? Actually, Lucy has short-term memory loss so every night all memory of her day is erased. But a man in love will go to any lengths to win over the girl of his dreams, and if that means having to find imaginative ways of doing it over again every day, then Henry's up for the challenge.

programme.title: She's Having a Baby
programme.desc: Kevin Bacon stars as a young man terrified of marriage and the adult responsibility that goes along with it. Elizabeth McGovern stars as his wife Kristy. Together Jake and Kristy face nearly every terror of young adulthood, from interfering in-laws and career crises to overextended credit and maintaining a house, but are they up to the perils of impending parenthood?

programme.title: Pretty in Pink
programme.desc: She's a high school girl from the wrong side of town. He's the wealthy heartthrob who asks her to the prom. But as fast as their romance builds, it's threatened by the painful reality of peer pressure.

programme.title: Easy A
programme.desc: After a little white lie about losing her virginity gets out, a clean-cut high school girl sees her life paralleling Hester Prynne's in 'The Scarlet Letter', which she is currently studying in school - until she decides to use the rumour mill to advance her social and financial standing.

programme.title: Bad Teacher
programme.desc: Take a lesson from Cameron Diaz when she stars as Elizabeth Halsey, a foulmouthed, ruthless and inappropriate teacher. She drinks, gets high and can't wait to marry a meal ticket to get out of her bogus day job. When she's dumped by her fiance, she sets her sights on a rich, handsome substitute (Justin Timberlake) while shrugging off the advances of the school gym teacher (Jason Segel). The consequences of her wild and outrageous schemes give her students, co-workers', and even herself, an education like no other.

programme.title: Steel Magnolias
programme.desc: In this poignant and often hilarious film a wedding is about to take place in Chinquapin, Louisiana. Bride Shelby is a headstrong young beauty whose iron-willed mother, M'Lynn, would do anything for her. programme.title: Pretty in Pink
programme.desc: She's a high school girl from the wrong side of town. He's the wealthy heartthrob who asks her to the prom. But as fast as their romance builds, it's threatened by the painful reality of peer pressure.

programme.title: Easy A
programme.desc: After a little white lie about losing her virginity gets out, a clean-cut high school girl sees her life paralleling Hester Prynne's in 'The Scarlet Letter', which she is currently studying in school - until she decides to use the rumour mill to advance her social and financial standing.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Anna Scott is the world's most famous movie star. Her picture has been plastered on the cover of every magazine, and every time she makes a movie, the entire world knows about it. William Thacker owns a travel bookstore in the quaint neighbourhood of Notting Hill. His business is stagnant, he has the roommate from hell and his love life is completely non-existent. Then one day, their paths cross and the couple comes to face the ultimate question: can two people fall in love with the whole world watching?

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Choc Chip Cookie
programme.desc: A baker in small-town Minnesota turns into an amateur detective after finding her friend and delivery driver shot to death behind her shop.

programme.title: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: Reuben Feffer is a guy who's spent his entire life playing it safe. Polly Prince is irresistible as a free-spirit who lives for the thrill of the moment. When these two comically mismatched souls collide, Reuben's world is turned upside down, as he makes an uproarious attempt to change his life from middle-of-the-road to totally-out-there.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: After breaking up with Mark Darcy, Bridget Jones's "happily ever after" hasn't quite gone according to plan. Fortysomething and single again, she decides to focus on her job as top news producer and surround herself with old friends and new. For once, Bridget has everything completely under control. What could possibly go wrong? Then her love life takes a turn and Bridget meets a dashing American named Jack, the suitor who is everything Mr. Darcy is not. In an unlikely twist she finds herself pregnant, but with one hitch she can only be fifty percent sure of the identity of her baby's father.

programme.title: Sidelined: The QB and Me
programme.desc: A headstrong dancer and a cocky quarterback fight against their feelings for each other as their post-grad future threatens to keep them apart.

programme.title: Sidelined 2: Intercepted
programme.desc: As college tests their relationship, freshman quarterback Drayton and promising dancer Dallas navigate love and distance while searching for who they're meant to be. As the pressures of ambition, recovery, and growing independence mount, the couple struggles to hold on.

programme.title: Just Go with It
programme.desc: Danny Maccabee meets the girl of his dreams, but has to enlist his loyal assistant, Katherine, to pretend to be his soon-to-be ex-wife in order to cover up a careless lie.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Anna Scott is the world's most famous movie star. Her picture has been plastered on the cover of every magazine, and every time she makes a movie, the entire world knows about it. William Thacker owns a travel bookstore in the quaint neighbourhood of Notting Hill. His business is stagnant, he has the roommate from hell and his love life is completely non-existent. Then one day, their paths cross and the couple comes to face the ultimate question: can two people fall in love with the whole world watching?

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Choc Chip Cookie
programme.desc: A baker in small-town Minnesota turns into an amateur detective after finding her friend and delivery driver shot to death behind her shop.

programme.title: Mack & Rita
programme.desc: Mack is tired of doing all the things she has to do to keep up with her friends and become successful in her 30s. Her deepest wish is to be an older woman so she can just chill out and wear a good chunky sweater. But when she's struck by lightning in a sound bath regression pod at Coachella and becomes Rita, a 65-year-old woman, Mack learns that the reality of being an older age isn't quite what she imagined.

programme.title: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: Reuben Feffer is a guy who's spent his entire life playing it safe. Polly Prince is irresistible as a free-spirit who lives for the thrill of the moment. When these two comically mismatched souls collide, Reuben's world is turned upside down, as he makes an uproarious attempt to change his life from middle-of-the-road to totally-out-there.

programme.title: Sidelined: The QB and Me
programme.desc: A headstrong dancer and a cocky quarterback fight against their feelings for each other as their post-grad future threatens to keep them apart.

programme.title: Sidelined 2: Intercepted
programme.desc: As college tests their relationship, freshman quarterback Drayton and promising dancer Dallas navigate love and distance while searching for who they're meant to be. As the pressures of ambition, recovery, and growing independence mount, the couple struggles to hold on.

programme.title: Just Go with It
programme.desc: Danny Maccabee meets the girl of his dreams, but has to enlist his loyal assistant, Katherine, to pretend to be his soon-to-be ex-wife in order to cover up a careless lie.

programme.title: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: Alex Whitman, a New York based site manager who builds nightclubs, is assigned to Las Vegas for his latest project. One night he meets Isabel Fuentes, a Mexican born photographer, and they end up sleeping together. The next morning she slips out and then shows up three months later to inform him that she's pregnant. She doesn't want to marry, but instead wants him to act like her boyfriend, so that her parents and other family members will get to meet the man she'll later say is the father of her baby. Things get complicated, however, when a romance blossoms between them and they quickly get married in a Vegas chapel. This doesn't go over well with her Mexican and his Manhattan parents. That, and their inability to decide where to live, begins to put a strain on their marriage. From that point on, they try to work things out as they have an on again, off again relationship.

programme.title: Her
programme.desc: Set in the Los Angeles of the slight future, this film follows Theodore Twombly, a complex, soulful man who makes his living writing touching, personal letters for other people. Heartbroken after the end of a long relationship, he becomes intrigued with a new, advanced operating system, which promises to be an intuitive entity in its own right, individual to each user. Upon initiating it, he is delighted to meet "Samantha", a bright, female voice, who is insightful, sensitive and surprisingly funny. As her needs and desires grow, in tandem with his own, their friendship deepens into an eventual love for each other. An original love story that explores the evolving nature - and the risks - of intimacy in the modern world.

programme.title: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: In one of the most surprising and unusual love stories, directed by Adrian Lyne, Robert Redford and Woody Harrelson star with Demi Moore in this sizzling, controversial exploration of modern love and morality where a billionaire offers David one million dollars for one night with his wife, Diana. David and Diana Murphy can end their financial worries if they accept the offer of billionaire financier John Gage. But will David and Diana accept? If they do, can their marriage survive? One million dollars, no questions asked - one night with Diana, nothing more.

programme.title: Far and Away
programme.desc: Ron Howard's epic tale tells the story of two Irish immigrants' quest for land during the 1800s Oklahoma land rush. Joseph Donnelly is an ambitious young farmer in western Ireland. When a local protest against wealthy landlord Daniel Christie results in the death of his father, Joseph seeks revenge. But his attempt vengeance is thwarted by Shannon Christie, the landlord's high-spirited and headstrong daughter, who stabs Joseph with a pitchfork. While convalescing at the Christie's manor, Joseph is propositioned by Shannon, who asks him to travel with her to America - where she is determined to acquire some of the free land being given away in the Oklahoma Territory. Arriving in Boston, Joseph acts as a protective brother to Shannon in the foreign city streets as they struggle to earn the money to travel out west.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Jo March reflects back and forth on her life, telling the beloved story of the March sisters - four young women, each determined to live life on her own terms.

programme.title: And So It Goes
programme.desc: There are a million reasons not to like realtor Oren Little, and that's just the way he likes it. Wilfully obnoxious to anyone who might cross his path, he wants nothing more than to sell one last house and retire in peace and quiet, until his estranged son suddenly drops off a granddaughter he never knew existed and turns his life upside-down. Clueless about how to care for a sweet, abandoned nine-year-old, he pawns her off to his determined and lovable neighbour Leah and tries to resume his life uninterrupted. But little by little, Oren stubbornly learns to open his heart to his family, to Leah and to life itself.

programme.title: Something Borrowed
programme.desc: Rachel is a generous and loyal pal to her engaged best friend, Darcy. But after celebrating her 30th birthday, perpetual good girl Rachel unexpectedly ends up in the arms of Dex, the guy she's had a crush on since law school - who happens to be Darcy's fiance. In the frantic weeks leading up to Darcy's wedding, Rachel finds herself caught between her long-time friendship with Darcy and the prospect of losing the love of her life.

programme.title: Her
programme.desc: Set in the Los Angeles of the slight future, this film follows Theodore Twombly, a complex, soulful man who makes his living writing touching, personal letters for other people. Heartbroken after the end of a long relationship, he becomes intrigued with a new, advanced operating system, which promises to be an intuitive entity in its own right, individual to each user. programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: Join Diane Keaton, Bette Midler and Goldie Hawn in this sinfully satisfying revenge romp about a trio of first wives who team up to teach their lying, cheating ex-husbands a lesson. Ivana Trump's galvanising cameo - 'don't get mad, dahlinks, get everytink' - sets the scene in a comedy that hinges on the self-mockery of its ageless stars. Midler's ball-busting shtick, Keaton's ditsy vulnerability and Hawn's eternal youth are just light-hearted grist for the mill of female friendship as a serious source of strength.

programme.title: And So It Goes
programme.desc: There are a million reasons not to like realtor Oren Little, and that's just the way he likes it. Wilfully obnoxious to anyone who might cross his path, he wants nothing more than to sell one last house and retire in peace and quiet, until his estranged son suddenly drops off a granddaughter he never knew existed and turns his life upside-down. Clueless about how to care for a sweet, abandoned nine-year-old, he pawns her off to his determined and lovable neighbour Leah and tries to resume his life uninterrupted. But little by little, Oren stubbornly learns to open his heart to his family, to Leah and to life itself.

programme.title: Public Enemies
programme.desc: John Dillinger, a charismatic and elusive bank robber, is marked by the FBI as America's first 'Public Enemy No.1' and Billie Frechette is the only woman capable of capturing his heart. Hunted relentlessly by top FBI agent Melvin Purvis, Dillinger engages in an escalating game of outrunning and outgunning the FBI, culminating in an explosive, legendary showdown.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, Bourne has left his violent past behind and is living a normal life with girlfriend Marie. But his plans for a peaceful life are crushed when he narrowly escapes an assassination attempt. Now hunted by an unknown enemy, Bourne proves to be neither an easy target nor a person whose skill, determination and resilience can be underestimated.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: In the year 2054, the head of a police unit specialising in pre-crime - the arrest and conviction of murderers before they commit their crime - finds himself accused of a future murder.

programme.title: Children of Men
programme.desc: It's 2027. There have been no births for 18 years. Humanity is doomed. Then Clive Owen discovers the key to survival, but can he protect his precious cargo?

programme.title: Once Upon A Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: The highly anticipated 9th film from Quentin Tarantino. In 1969 Los Angeles, during the Charles Manson murders, a TV actor and his stunt double, embark on an odyssey to make a name for themselves in the film industry.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Having lost his memory and the one person he loved, Bourne is forced to hunt down his past in order to find a future. Travelling from Moscow, Paris and London to Tangier and New York City, he continues his quest to find the real Jason Bourne, all the while trying to out-manoeuvre the scores of cops, federal officers and Interpol agents who have him in their sights.

programme.title: Public Enemies

Travelling from Moscow, Paris and London to Tangier and New York City, he continues his quest to find the real Jason Bourne, all the while trying to out-manoeuvre the scores of cops, federal officers and Interpol agents who have him in their sights.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Sea Change
programme.desc: A small-town police chief (Tom Selleck) reopens a 12-year-old murder case while investigating a rape aboard a yacht.

programme.title: The Frozen Ground
programme.desc: This film is inspired by the incredible true story that follows Alaskan State Trooper Jack Halcombe as he sets out to end the murderous rampage of Robert Hansen, a serial killer who has gone unnoticed for 13 years. As the bodies of street girls start to pile up in Anchorage, fear strikes a chord with the public. Risking his life, Halcombe goes on a personal manhunt to find the killer before the next body surfaces. When a seventeen year old escapee reveals key information about the case, Halcombe is finally on the trail of the killer. But will he catch him in time to save the next victim?

programme.title: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: When Langdon discovers evidence of the resurgence of an ancient secret brotherhood known as the Illuminati, he also faces a deadly threat to the existence of the secret organisation's most despised enemy: the Catholic Church. When he learns that the clock is ticking on an unstoppable Illuminati time bomb, he jets to Rome where he joins forces with beautiful Italian scientist Vittoria Vetra and together they follow a 400-year-old trail of ancient symbols that mark the Vatican's only hope for survival.

programme.title: Sleepers
programme.desc: In a tale of innocence lost and vengeance unleashed, four men plot retribution over their mistreatment in a violent reform school as boys.

programme.title: A Man Called Otto
programme.desc: Otto is a grump who's given up on life following the loss of his wife, and wants to end it all. When a young family moves in nearby, he meets his match in quick-witted Marisol.

programme.title: Knives Out
programme.desc: Detective Benoit Blanc is enlisted to investigate the untimely death of a renowned crime novelist. Blanc must sift through a web of red herrings and lies to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Sea Change
programme.desc: A small-town police chief (Tom Selleck) reopens a 12-year-old murder case while investigating a rape aboard a yacht.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: A Will To Kill
programme.desc: Ex-prosecutor Hailey Dean becomes a marriage counsellor and therapist. But, she gets caught up in a missing case and tries to solve the mystery surrounded by it to uncover the whole truth.

programme.title: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: When Langdon discovers evidence of the resurgence of an ancient secret brotherhood known as the Illuminati, he also faces a deadly threat to the existence of the secret organisation's most despised enemy: the Catholic Church. When he learns that the clock is ticking on an unstoppable Illuminati time bomb, he jets to Rome where he joins forces with beautiful Italian scientist Vittoria Vetra and together they follow a 400-year-old trail of ancient symbols that mark the Vatican's only hope for survival.

programme.title: Sleepers
programme.desc: In a tale of innocence lost and vengeance unleashed, four men plot retribution over their mistreatment in a violent reform school as boys.

programme.title: A Man Called Otto
programme.desc: Otto is a grump who's given up on life following the loss of his wife, and wants to end it all. When a young family moves in nearby, he meets his match in quick-witted Marisol.

programme.title: Knives Out
programme.desc: Detective Benoit Blanc is enlisted to investigate the untimely death of a renowned crime novelist. Blanc must sift through a web of red herrings and lies to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Takers
programme.desc: A notorious group of criminals continue to baffle police by pulling off perfectly executed bank robberies. They are in and out like clockwork, leaving no evidence behind and laying low in between heists. But when they attempt to pull off one last job with more money at stake than ever before, the crew may find their plans interrupted by a hardened detective who is hell-bent on solving the case.

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: A FedEx systems engineer's ruled-by-the-clock existence abruptly ends when a harrowing plane crash leaves him isolated on a remote island. As Chuck struggles to survive, he finds that his own personal journey has only just begun.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Thin Ice
programme.desc: A police chief (Tom Selleck) lands in trouble with the town council after a shootout on the streets of Boston.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: No Remorse
programme.desc: Jesse, having been suspended by the local town council, moonlights for his friend, State Homicide Commander Healy by investigating a series of murders in Boston.

programme.title: Elizabeth: The Golden Age
programme.desc: In late 16th century Europe, Elizabeth finds her rule openly challenged by the Spanish King Philip II with his powerful army and sea-dominating armada determined to restore England to Catholicism.

programme.title: Sense and Sensibility
programme.desc: Based on Jane Austen's classic novel, this tells of the Dashwood sisters, sensible Elinor and passionate Marianne, whose chances at marriage seem doomed by their family's sudden loss of fortune. Rickman, Grant and Greg Wise co-star as the well-intentioned suitors who are trapped by the strict rules of society and the conflicting laws of desire.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: A multi-layered examination of the 2009 hijacking of the US container ship Maersk Alabama by a crew of Somali pirates. The film focuses on the relationship between the Alabama's commanding officer, Captain Richard Phillips, and the Somali pirate captain, Muse, who takes him hostage. Phillips and Muse are set on an unstoppable collision course when Muse and his crew target Phillips' unarmed ship; in the ensuing standoff, 145 miles off the Somali coast, both men will find themselves at the mercy of forces beyond their control.

programme.title: Father Stu
programme.desc: After surviving a motorcycle accident, a former boxer and long-time agnostic starts to wonder if he can use his second chance to help others, and his journey from self-destruction to redemption inspired countless people along the way.

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: A FedEx systems engineer's ruled-by-the-clock existence abruptly ends when a harrowing plane crash leaves him isolated on a remote island. As Chuck struggles to survive, he finds that his own personal journey has only just begun.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: No Remorse
programme.desc: Jesse, having been suspended by the local town council, moonlights for his friend, State Homicide Commander Healy by investigating a series of murders in Boston.

programme.title: Elizabeth: The Golden Age
programme.desc: In late 16th century Europe, Elizabeth finds her rule openly challenged by the Spanish King Philip II with his powerful army and sea-dominating armada determined to restore England to Catholicism.

programme.title: Sense and Sensibility
programme.desc: Based on Jane Austen's classic novel, this tells of the Dashwood sisters, sensible Elinor and passionate Marianne, whose chances at marriage seem doomed by their family's sudden loss of fortune. Rickman, Grant and Greg Wise co-star as the well-intentioned suitors who are trapped by the strict rules of society and the conflicting laws of desire.

programme.title: Gothika
programme.desc: A brilliant and respected criminal psychologist, Dr Miranda Grey is an expert at knowing what is rational. Under the direction of her husband, Miranda treats dangerously disturbed patients at the Woodward Penitentiary for Women. Miranda's life is thrust into terrifying jeopardy when a cryptic encounter with a mysterious young girl leads to a nightmare beyond her wildest imagination.

programme.title: The Bone Collector
programme.desc: A murderer is loose on the streets of Manhattan. A diabolical killer whose brutal slayings leave a trail of cryptic messages hidden at the scene of the crime. Clues which only a brilliant mind can interpret. Lincoln Rhyme is a gifted but disabled detective who is assigned to the case as the city becomes gripped with fear. Amelia Donaghy is a feisty, street-smart policewoman, who together with Lincoln, must go inside the mind of this terrifying madman and defeat him at his own game.

programme.title: Inside Man
programme.desc: A tough cop, a clever bank robber, and a powerbroker fuel a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse full of hidden agendas and explosive surprises.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Innocents Lost
programme.desc: A reinstated police chief (Tom Selleck) battles his own demons while investigating the death of a teenage girl.

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: On the verge of having their conspiracy exposed, members of the government's intelligence community will stop at nothing to erase all evidence of their top secret programs - even the agents involved. Aaron Cross must use his genetically-engineered skills to survive the ultimate game of cat-and-mouse and finish what Jason Bourne started.

programme.title: The Invisible Man
programme.desc: Cecilia tries to rebuild her life after the death of her abusive partner. But before long, she questions whether or not he is truly gone.

programme.desc: A poignant story of one boy's childhood amid the music and social tumult of the late 1960s.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A Harvard professor implicated in a murder must unravel an ancient code to expose the greatest conspiracy in history.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Stone Cold
programme.desc: A series of strange murders sends shivers through a quiet New England town. It's up to a hard-as-nails police chief Jesse Stone to find the psychopath behind the savage crimes.

programme.title: The Phantom of the Opera
programme.desc: This film tells the story of a disfigured musical genius who haunts the catacombs beneath the Paris Opera, waging a reign of terror over its occupants. When he falls fatally in love with the lovely Christine, the Phantom devotes himself to creating a new star for the Opera, exerting a strange sense of control over the young soprano as he nurtures her extraordinary talents.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: Welcome to Kehoe, it's -10 degrees and counting at this glitzy ski resort in the Rocky Mountains. The local police aren't used to much action until the son of unassuming town snowplough driver, Nels Coxman, is murdered at the order of Viking, a flamboyant drug lord. Fuelled by rage and armed with heavy machinery, Nels sets out to dismantle the cartel one man at a time, but his understanding of murder comes mainly from what he read in a crime novel. As the bodies pile up, his actions ignite a turf war between Viking and his long-standing rival White Bull, a soulful Native-American mafia boss, that will quickly escalate and turn the small town's bright white slopes blood-red.

programme.title: Children of Men
programme.desc: It's 2027. There have been no births for 18 years. Humanity is doomed. Then Clive Owen discovers the key to survival, but can he protect his precious cargo?

programme.title: Nymphomaniac: Vol 2
programme.desc: Continues with the story of self-diagnosed nymphomaniac Joe exploring her adulthood, during which her journey of self-discovery leads to darker complications.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For over a decade, the drivers have battled it all from ferocious storms to freezing temperatures to bitter rivalries. And of course, they've confronted the deadly ice crossings that have tested their ability to survive. But now, as this program is in its landmark 11th season, a sense of urgency descends on the drivers. The roads are opening late and closing early. Every load could be the last one to make it up the trails. At any time, the roads could be shut down and tens of thousands of tons in freight won't be delivered. It's a rush from day one and the mission is clear: pedal to the metal and never let up. The communities are counting on them now more than ever. In this episode, the ice is right? After two short seasons, the drivers are ready for what is forecast to be a cold and busy winter. But the tragic passing of legendary driver Darrell Ward leaves the community of drivers wondering who can take his place.

programme.title: Outback Car Hunters
programme.desc: Can Dave and GT transform a rare Kombi wreck into a weekend surf wagon? And a forgotten Mercedes convertible gets a magic makeover.

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: A P Plate driver without plates on his vehicle is caught doing 106Kph in an 80Kph zone and then get abusive towards the officers. Illegal use of mobile phones continues to be a problem, and drivers routinely ignore road works speed restrictions.

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: A speeder, not even driving his own vehicle, actually tries to persuade the officer that he accelerated to escape a van that was following him. Phone users in a school zone attract officers attention, and sadly the drivers still act indignant and upset when ticketed. A speeding Harley riders' bike is so noisy he doesn't even hear the police sirens behind him.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: There's trouble in the wind for Kurt Shepherd who is struggling with a load causing oversized problems. For Johnny Dowell on the Tanami Track it's too hard one minute and too soft the next.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick and Chum show off their pearly whites when a seller brings in a pair of Tyrannosaur teeth. Will they be chomping at the bit or will the deal go extinct? Then, Corey goes to bat for a signed Mark Buerhle jersey. Can he pitch a perfect deal? Meanwhile, a set of 'M*A*S*H' action figures is on Rick's radar. But can he 'Kling' to these items, or will they go AWOL? And later, Chum and Corey don their best boots to get into the spirit when they check out a collection of Tanya Tucker worn items.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Storage unit auctions are the newest and biggest untapped source for hidden treasures, and opportunistic individuals bid on unclaimed properties hoping to strike gold. In this character-driven treasure hunt, bidders range from twenty-somethings out for fun and adventure, willing to say or do anything to win, to husband and wife teams looking to make fast and large cash, and all are prepared to create quite the drama in the process. It's a dramatic environment as the bidders assess if they think the unit is worth a bid and how high they will actually go. In each self-contained episode, our cast of characters head to storage units and wait anxiously for the big reveal of what is behind the door. The owner of the facility will cut the lock to a delinquent unit and raise the door for the first time, allowing bidders to peer inside for a brief moment, aided only by a flashlight.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Proving he's as diabolical in real life as he is in the Inbetweeners, Greg Davies sets our five comedians absurd tasks such as jelly balancing and coconut costumes.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: The locals of Louisiana who live in the swamps of the Atchafalaya River Basin face certain challenges as they hunt American alligators for their livelihood.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters
programme.desc: The team unveil the greatest mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle. Investigators provide inside information on what may have happened to the most famous missing ships and planes.

programme.title: Fired on Mars
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Regan's explosive birthday party, Jeff finds himself at a crossroads, while Jaxton faces the sleep tank.

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: To get some big drinkers into the bar, the boys try to infiltrate the local firm of chariot hooligans. Grumio is welcomed by the head of the Green Army, but Marcus gets into bother with Gloria.

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: The boys begin an archaeological dig in their bar after Grumio unearths an old brooch while sitting on the loo, but the death of a professor is cause for concern.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: At the halfway mark, Susan Wokoma uncovers something in a flower, Lucy Beaumont works wonders with loo roll, and Julian Clary spooks some receptacles.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: The locals of Louisiana who live in the swamps of the Atchafalaya River Basin face certain challenges as they hunt American alligators for their livelihood.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For two months out of every year, a group of exceptional men find their way to the Canadian tundra to undertake one of the most dangerous jobs on Earth. In the thick of winter, truckers in giant 18-wheelers carry vital equipment and supplies to miners hundreds of miles away. In blizzard conditions, these truckers travel over ice roads that often take them over frozen lakes. Each man is trained in self survival, from fixing his truck in sub-zero conditions in seconds to escaping from a truck if the ice cracks. On the other end of the journey are miners whose lives depend on the truckers making it to their base, year after year.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: They drive the biggest trucks on Earth along the toughest roads and loneliest highways in the world. They are Australia's outback truckers: men and women in monster rigs, on marathon runs, through some of the most inhospitable terrain on the planet. Out here only one thing matters: getting there and back alive.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: They drive the biggest trucks on Earth along the toughest roads and loneliest highways in the world. They are Australia's outback truckers, men and women in monster rigs, on marathon runs, through some of the most inhospitable terrain on the planet. Out here only one thing matters, getting there and back alive. In Perth, lone trucking operator Steve Grahame is preparing for an epic journey, a 3000km trek to the top of Western Australia. Also, we get to meet a former model now truckie.

programme.title: Cabin Truckers
programme.desc: There's a dream home - and there's a dream location. Cabin Truckers follows the incredible exploits of hauling colossal cabins to remote, picturesque locations. Watch as an expert team navigates through extremely rocky, mountainous terrain, delivering precious cargo to thrilled homeowners. The Corbiell family is moving onto 300 acres of land that has been in the family for generations. They have found their dream home, but at 1708 square feet, can Kelly and his team can deliver this house in one piece?

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: In a time when creditors have closed their purse strings and stopped lending, the residents of Detroit know they can always rely on American Jewelry and Loan, 'The Working Man's Bank'. Follow the Gold family as they wheel and deal with colourful customers, manage temperamental employees, and squabble with each other, all in the name of making a buck in one of the most troubled cities in America.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: Jason's brother Darius is getting married and Marcus desperately wants to hire out the Crown and Toga for the occasion. But their plans are threatened when they find out that Darius is a serial jilter.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters
programme.desc: The team take on the twisted case of a missing luxury boat called the Saba Bank, lost in the vicinity of the Bermuda Triangle in 1974, but new leads suggest even deadlier forces are responsible.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: They drive the biggest trucks on Earth along the toughest roads and loneliest highways in the world. They are Australia's outback truckers, men and women in monster rigs, on marathon runs, through some of the most inhospitable terrain on the planet. Out here only one thing matters, getting there and back alive. In the wilds of north-western Australia veteran truckie Steve Grahame is in the middle of an epic journey, trying to deliver essential supplies to a remote community, but the weather and roads are conspiring against him. Also, ex-model turned truckie Deb Drew is into the fourth day of a 7000km trek from Melbourne to Darwin and back.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: They drive the biggest trucks on Earth along the toughest roads and loneliest highways in the world. They are Australia's outback truckers, men and women in monster rigs, on marathon runs, through some of the most inhospitable terrain on the planet. Out here only one thing matters, getting there and back alive. Dougal Brett is one unusual truckie: he flies his own helicopter, owns a cattle station the size of a small country, and a fleet of livestock trucks. Heavy haulage driver Mark King is halfway through a marathon job. He's in charge of getting a monster mining truck from Brisbane to central Queensland. On a lonely dirt road at the top of North Western Australia, veteran Perth truckie Steve Grahame is a broken man. Fifty kilometres short of his destination, part of a dirt track has collapsed under the weight of his 100-tonne road train.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters
programme.desc: The team has secret intel on a wreck that might be a legendary 1930s disappearance: lured by a strange light, the Ingomar's seasoned crew smashes into an unseen obstacle.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek and friends critique viral videos, categorizing them into "Hot Mess," "Worst Case Scenario," "Redneck Good Times," and "What Happened Last Night".

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek and friends critique viral videos, categorizing them into "Hot Mess," "Worst Case Scenario," "Redneck Good Times," and "What Happened Last Night".

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Mark Watson and Nish Kumar pop toast together and Sally Phillips spreads absinthe on it. Greg Davies dishes out the absurd A-list challenges once more.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Storage unit auctions are the newest and biggest untapped source for hidden treasures, and opportunistic individuals bid on unclaimed properties hoping to strike gold. In this character-driven treasure hunt, bidders range from twenty-somethings out for fun and adventure, willing to say or do anything to win, to husband and wife teams looking to make fast and large cash, and all are prepared to create quite the drama in the process. It's a dramatic environment as the bidders assess if they think the unit is worth a bid and how high they will actually go. In each self-contained episode, our cast of characters head to storage units and wait anxiously for the big reveal of what is behind the door. The owner of the facility will cut the lock to a delinquent unit and raise the door for the first time, allowing bidders to peer inside for a brief moment, aided only by a flashlight.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Storage unit auctions are the newest and biggest untapped source for hidden treasures, and opportunistic individuals bid on unclaimed properties hoping to strike gold.
