When one police droid, Chappie, is stolen and given new programming, he becomes the first robot with the ability to think and feel for himself. As powerful, destructive forces start to see Chappie as a danger to mankind and order, they will stop at nothing to maintain the status quo and ensure that Chappie is the last of his kind.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City
programme.desc: Survivors try to uncover the truth behind the evil Umbrella Corp while battling bloodthirsty zombies in the wastelands of Raccoon City.

programme.title: World War Z
programme.desc: The story revolves around United Nations employee Gerry Lane, who traverses the world in a race against time to stop a pandemic that is toppling armies and governments and threatening to decimate humanity itself.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout
programme.desc: On a dangerous assignment to recover stolen plutonium, Ethan Hunt chooses to save his team over completing the mission, allowing nuclear weapons to fall into the hands of a deadly network of highly-skilled operatives intent on destroying civilization. Now, with the world at risk, Ethan and his IMF team are forced to become reluctant partners with a hard-hitting CIA agent as they race against time to stop the nuclear fallout. There's never been a threat more destructive, stunts so jaw-dropping in the film critics are calling the best "Mission" yet!

programme.title: Death Race
programme.desc: The world's hunger for extreme sports and reality competitions has grown into reality TV bloodlust. Now, the most extreme racing competition has emerged and its contestants are murderous prisoners. The rules of the Death Race are simple: win five events and you're set free. Lose and you're road kill splashed across the Internet.

programme.title: F9: The Fast Saga
programme.desc: The true meaning of family gets tested like never before as Dom Toretto takes the team on a worldwide ride with high-stakes action, old friends and a surprising new foe.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson stars as Driver who, after spending 10 years in prison, is intent on avenging the murder of his brother during the botched bank robbery that led to his imprisonment. He has a list of names to eliminate, but a veteran cop on the eve of retirement and a professional assassin who is passionate about his job are both on his tail. As Driver seeks out the people on his list, the details about the circumstances in which his brother was killed becomes muddled and it seems that his list may be incomplete.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra
programme.desc: From the Central Asian mountains to the deserts of Egypt, through the crowded streets of Paris, to beneath the ice cap of the North Pole, the elite team of operatives known as GI Joe journey on a nonstop adventure, as they use the latest in next-generation spy technology and military equipment to fight the duplicitous arms dealer Destro, and the growing threat of the mysterious Cobra organisation from plunging the world into chaos.

programme.title: A Quiet Place
programme.desc: If they hear you, they hunt you. In this terrifyingly suspenseful thriller, a family must navigate their lives in silence to avoid mysterious creatures that hunt by sound. Knowing that even the slightest whisper or footstep can bring death, Evelyn and Lee Abbott are determined to find a way to protect their children at all costs while they desperately search for a way to fight back.

programme.title: The Invitation
programme.desc: After the death of her mother, Evie is approached by an unknown cousin who invites her to a lavish wedding in the English countryside. Soon, she realises a gothic conspiracy is afoot and must fight for survival as she uncovers twisted secrets in her family's history.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: Now that Dom and Letty are married, Brian and Mia have retired from the game, and the rest of the crew have been exonerated, the globetrotting team has found a semblance of a normal life. But when a mysterious woman seduces Dom into the world of crime he can't seem to escape, they will face trials that will test them as never before. From the shores of Cuba and the streets of New York City to the icy plains off the arctic Barents Sea, our elite force will criss-cross the globe to stop an anarchist from unleashing chaos on the world's stage, and bring home the man who made them a family.

programme.title: Hard Kill
programme.desc: A billionaire CEO hires a team of mercenaries to protect a lethal piece of technology when his daughter is kidnapped.

programme.title: Dracula Untold
programme.desc: The year is 1462 and Transylvania has enjoyed a prolonged period of peace under the just and fair rule of the battle-weary Vlad III, the prince of Wallachia. But when Sultan Mehmed II demands 1000 of Wallachia's boys including Vlad's own son to become child soldiers in his army, Vlad must enter into a Faustian bargain to save his family and his people. He gains the strength of 100 men, the speed of a falling star and the power to crush his enemies. In exchange, he's inflicted with an insatiable thirst for human blood that could force him into a life of darkness and destroy all that he holds dear.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: This film begins after an epic battle left a great city torn, but with the world saved. As humanity picks up the pieces, a shadowy group reveals itself in an attempt to control the direction of history while an ancient, powerful new menace sets Earth in its crosshairs. With help from a new cast of humans, Optimus Prime and the Autobots rise to meet their most fearsome challenge yet. In an incredible adventure, they are swept up in a war of good and evil, ultimately leading to a climactic battle across the world.

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: Based on the Valiant Comics series, Bloodshot, an ex-killer for the mob and slain soldier, is re-animated with superpowers.

programme.title: Bad Boys For Life
programme.desc: The original Bad Boys are back! After a string of assassinations and an attempt on Mike's life, he convinces a hesitant Marcus to hold off retirement and partner one last time.

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Hobbs and Shaw, the trash-talking sworn enemies, must team up to take down a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist with a bio weapon that threatens the fate of humanity.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Humans are at war with the Transformers, and Optimus Prime is gone. The key to saving the future lies buried in the secrets of the past and the hidden history of Transformers on Earth. Now, it's up to the unlikely alliance of Cade Yeager, Bumblebee, an English lord and an Oxford professor to save the world.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: The Jurassic World theme park lets guests experience the thrill of witnessing actual dinosaurs, but something ferocious lurks behind the park's attractions - a genetically modified dinosaur with savage capabilities. When the massive creature escapes, chaos erupts across the island. Now it's up to Owen and Claire to save the park's tourists from an all-out prehistoric assault.

programme.title: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Beck is a bounty hunter sent into the treacherous jungles of the Amazon to bring the rebellious Travis back to the States. When Beck and Travis reluctantly join forces to hunt down a priceless treasure, this unlikely team embarks on a pulse-pounding, nonstop thrill ride.

programme.title: Bastille Day
programme.desc: When a reckless CIA agent and a brilliant pickpocket uncover a large-scale conspiracy, they must work together in order to take down a common enemy.

programme.title: The Grudge
programme.desc: A house is cursed by a vengeful ghost that curses those who enter it with a violent death.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: A documentary film crew, headed by anthropologist Steve Cale and director Terri Flores, ventures into the world's most isolated jungle - the Amazon - in search of a lost and forgotten civilisation. Early in their journey, they come to the aid of Paul Serone, a Paraguayan guide, who joins their expedition. But Serone is actually a poacher on the trail of a legendary snake. When Serone hijacks the boat and its crew on his quest to track and kill the giant snake, he steers the expedition right into the path of the deadly monster.

programme.title: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: In this prequel to the blockbuster Mummy films, a mercenary is hired by a dissident alliance to kill the beautiful sorceress Cassandra, from whom the brutal tyrant Memnon draws his strength. Once Cassandra is removed the alliance plans to face Memnon's armies on their own terms, but the sorceress is not all she seems in this swirling, CGI-laden romp.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: Cybertron has fallen. When Optimus Prime sends Bumblebee to protect Earth, he begins his journey to become the hero the Universe needs. Crash landing, with no memory of his past, Bumblebee takes refuge in a junkyard disguised as a VW Beetle. Charlie (Hailee Steinfeld), a teenager trying to find her place in the world, discovers and repairs the battle-scarred robot. When the Decepticons forge an alliance with a secret agency led by Agent Burns (John Cena) to hunt down the remaining Autobots, Bumblebee and Charlie team up to protect the world in an action-packed adventure filled with humour and heart that's fun for the whole family.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: A documentary film crew, headed by anthropologist Steve Cale and director Terri Flores, ventures into the world's most isolated jungle - the Amazon - in search of a lost and forgotten civilisation. Early in their journey, they come to the aid of Paul Serone, a Paraguayan guide, who joins their expedition. But Serone is actually a poacher on the trail of a legendary snake. When Serone hijacks the boat and its crew on his quest to track and kill the giant snake, he steers the expedition right into the path of the deadly monster.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A young woman dies after she starts bleeding from her eyes, nose, and mouth while at a party aboard a subway train, leading the team to speculate that she is the victim of a biological attack.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs are called in when a young paintball champion is found dead in a warehouse. They soon find out that his fiercest rival, with whom he was faced in a death match, has gone missing.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.sub-title: And Here's To You, Mrs. Azrael
programme.desc: A young girl is found murdered in her hospital room, five days after getting into a car accident which left her paralysed and her passenger dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A parachute jumper meets his death when his parachute is struck by a flock of pigeons, all of which strangely end up dead beside his body.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs are called in when a bartender is robbed and shot. When the police capture a suspect matching a witness' description, the team is stunned when the suspect is Sheldon Hawkes.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Hawkes have a problem when they find out that the family of a murder victim are all deaf, so they have to find a new way to catch the killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team is called in when a man is found dead on the Brooklyn Bridge after what appears to be an unsuccessful marriage proposal.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team is called in when three young women rob a diamond store dressed as Audrey Hepburn's character Holly Golightly from Breakfast at Tiffany's, leaving one man dead from accidental causes.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny, Flack, and Lindsay encounter a rapidly-melting crime scene when a model is found dead at an ice-themed promotional party for vodka, apparently stabbed by an icicle.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A decapitated corpse is found hung upside-down in a dorm room during a party. The shirt the victim was wearing is decorated with symbols out of numerology and Greek mythology.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny, Lindsay, and Hawkes investigate the murder of one of the altporn models known as the Suicide Girls while Mac and Stella look for answers in the death of a street basketball player.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: While investigating the death of a hotel employee at a swimsuit modelling shoot, the CSI team hears shots across the street and run to another crime scene where a shocked woman has just shot an intruder.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A young woman dies after she starts bleeding from her eyes, nose, and mouth while at a party aboard a subway train, leading the team to speculate that she is the victim of a biological attack.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs are called in when a young paintball champion is found dead in a warehouse. They soon find out that his fiercest rival, with whom he was faced in a death match, has gone missing.

programme.desc: A man is found shot dead in a rundown Rockaway Beach house under a pile of money. Outside in his backyard is an ark that contains animals and eight people.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A woman is found sawn in half inside a magician's wooden box onstage in an abandoned Times Square theatre. The investigation reveals the victim worked for a famous illusionist.

programme.desc: When a body is stolen from the coroner's van the team stumbles onto a lab performing genetic testing on human hibernation.

programme.desc: Danny and Lindsay investigate a mass murder at the infamous Amityville Horror house. Before Lindsay can close the case, she is warned by someone to leave the house, or she will be in great danger.

programme.desc: Danny and Lindsay investigate the death of a woman shot dead on the steps of the Metropolitan Museum of Art while Mac and Stella investigate the death of a man stabbed to death in Madison Square Park.

programme.desc: When a supermodel is found dead in a giant martini glass on a Times Square billboard, the CSI team follows the evidence in search of the party crasher.

programme.desc: Mac investigates a groom murdered on his wedding day, found stuffed and wrapped like a wedding present. Stella finds a box of blood spattered puzzle pieces left on her car, which links to Mac's past.

programme.desc: Mac goes home to Chicago, trying to solve the mystery of the 333 stalker. Meanwhile, back in New York, the 333 stalker targets the rest of the CSI team.

programme.desc: Three drug dealers who are facing trial for killing a man are all shot and killed before their trial within minutes of each other.

programme.desc: The remains of a pregnant 17-year-old are found in the trunk of a crushed car, but the baby is missing.

programme.desc: The death of a Ukrainian man helps CSI uncover a sex trafficking ring.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When the deputy mayor is killed, suspicion quickly falls on a sleazy newspaper publisher.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The lab tackles a case involving a murdered Internet entrepreneur whose body has been picked apart by vultures.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: An environmental terrorist group bombs the home of an electronics recycler, and his daughter is killed - but the daughter is part of the terrorist group.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The lab makes a grisly discovery while investigating the death of a former medical examiner office employee's wife, and Stella sets up a trap for the Greek coin thieves.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: CSI tries to figure who is responsible for the death of the chief of a Native American tribe that was one of the original inhabitants of Manhattan.

programme.title: The Unlikely Pilgrimage of Harold Fry
programme.desc: Harold is an ordinary man who has passed through life, living on the side lines, until he goes to post a letter one day and just keeps walking.

programme.title: A United Kingdom
programme.desc: This film tells the true story of Seretse Khama, King of Bechuanaland, and Ruth Williams, the London office worker he married in 1947 in the face of fierce opposition from their families and the British and South African governments.

programme.title: Belle
programme.desc: This film is inspired by the true story of Dido Elizabeth Belle, the illegitimate mixed race daughter of Admiral Sir John Lindsay. Raised by her aristocratic great-uncle Lord Mansfield and his wife, Belle's lineage affords her certain privileges, yet her status prevents her from the traditions of noble social standing. While her cousin Elizabeth chases suitors for marriage, Belle is left on the sidelines wondering if she will ever find love. After meeting an idealistic young vicar's son bent on changing society, he and Belle help shape Lord Mansfield's role as Lord Chief Justice to end slavery in England.

programme.title: The Angels' Share
programme.desc: Scotland. A whimsical crime caper about four crooks in Glasgow who find redemption, if not exactly rehabilitation, through an unlikely whisky heist.

programme.title: Swimming with Men
programme.desc: Faced with a full-blown mid-life crisis, accountant Eric joins an all-male group of synchronised swimmers, discovering that making patterns in a pool can, for a couple of hours at least, smooth out the bumps in his work and marriage. Initially keeping their personal lives in the locker, the ramshackle squad and coach Susan slowly learn to reveal their inner lives, as well as their paunches. But can they get their lives and routines in sync as they embark on an unlikely journey to Milan to compete in the World Championship?

programme.title: In Bruges
programme.desc: After a job goes wrong, hit men Ray and Ken are ordered by their crime boss to cool their heels in Bruges, Belgium. They don't make good tourists, however, and soon find themselves in the oddest of circumstances as they navigate the seemingly fairytale city.

programme.title: Raging Grace
programme.desc: An undocumented Filipino immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home, securing a better future for her family, but a dark discovery threatens to destroy everything.

programme.title: The Unlikely Pilgrimage of Harold Fry
programme.desc: Harold is an ordinary man who has passed through life, living on the side lines, until he goes to post a letter one day and just keeps walking.

programme.title: A United Kingdom
programme.desc: This film tells the true story of Seretse Khama, King of Bechuanaland, and Ruth Williams, the London office worker he married in 1947 in the face of fierce opposition from their families and the British and South African governments.

programme.title: Belle

After meeting an idealistic young vicar's son bent on changing society, he and Belle help shape Lord Mansfield's role as Lord Chief Justice to end slavery in England.

programme.title: Testament of Youth
programme.desc: A powerful story of love, war and remembrance, based on the First World War memoir by Vera Brittain, which has become the classic testimony of that war from a woman's point of view. A searing journey from youthful hopes and dreams to the edge of despair and back again, it's a film about young love, the futility of war and how to make sense of the darkest times.

programme.title: Swimming with Men

Initially keeping their personal lives in the locker, the ramshackle squad and coach Susan slowly learn to reveal their inner lives, as well as their paunches. But can they get their lives and routines in sync as they embark on an unlikely journey to Milan to compete in the World Championship?

programme.title: In Bruges
programme.desc: After a job goes wrong, hit men Ray and Ken are ordered by their crime boss to cool their heels in Bruges, Belgium. They don't make good tourists, however, and soon find themselves in the oddest of circumstances as they navigate the seemingly fairytale city.

programme.title: Raging Grace
programme.desc: An undocumented Filipino immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home, securing a better future for her family, but a dark discovery threatens to destroy everything.

programme.title: Another Year
programme.desc: A moving reflection on life's joys and sorrows. Tom and Gerri are a married couple who have managed to remain blissfully happy into their autumn years. Over the course of four seasons in one year, they are surrounded by friends, colleagues and family as they negotiate life with kindness, love and good cheer.

programme.title: Viceroy's House
programme.desc: The final Viceroy of India, Lord Mountbatten, is tasked with overseeing the transition of British India to independence, but meets with conflict as different sides clash.

programme.title: Tell it to the Bees
programme.desc: A shunned small-town doctor and beekeeper in post-war Britain befriends a struggling mother and son, helping them discover that love can be found in many forms.

programme.title: Bright Young Things
programme.desc: Directed and written by Stephen Fry and based on the novel, Vile Bodies by Evelyn Waugh, BRIGHT YOUNG THINGS is a look at the upper crust British society during the frenzied 1930s. The story follows the lives of a group of young socialites also known as the "Bright Young Things."

programme.title: Ironclad
programme.desc: Set in the 13th century, this tale sees a rag-tag group of knights battle a devious king (Paul Giamatti). James Purefoy, Brian Cox & Kate Mara also star in this action-charged adventure.

programme.title: Their Finest
programme.desc: 1940, London, the Blitz; with the country's morale at stake, Catrin, an untried screenwriter, and a makeshift cast and crew, work under fire to make a film to lift the nation's spirits - and inspire America to join the war. A witty, romantic and moving portrayal of a young woman finding her way, and her voice, in the mayhem of war and the movies!

programme.title: Another Year
programme.desc: A moving reflection on life's joys and sorrows. Tom and Gerri are a married couple who have managed to remain blissfully happy into their autumn years. Over the course of four seasons in one year, they are surrounded by friends, colleagues and family as they negotiate life with kindness, love and good cheer.

programme.title: Viceroy's House
programme.desc: The final Viceroy of India, Lord Mountbatten, is tasked with overseeing the transition of British India to independence, but meets with conflict as different sides clash.

programme.title: The Best Offer
programme.desc: Virgil Oldman is a solitary, cultured man whose reluctance to engage with others, especially women, is matched only by the dogged obsessiveness with which he practices his profession of antiques dealer. He's never been close to another human being, not even Robert, his only friend - a young, skilful restorer of mechanical devices from every era. The day he turns 63, Virgil receives a phone call from a young woman who asks him to handle the disposal of some family works of art. But when the time comes for his first site visit, the girl fails to appear, nor, for various reasons, is she present for the taking of the inventory or for the transportation and restoration of the pieces. More than once Virgil is tempted to bow out of what appears to be nothing but a bothersome mess, but on each occasion, the mysterious young woman, locked in her own obsessive world, convinces him to continue. And with this, the old antique dealer's life begins to take an unexpected turn. It is Robert who shows him, step-by-step, how to win the heart of a young woman who is afraid of the world and, caught in the middle of this puzzling game of chess, Virgil soon finds himself enveloped by a passion that will transform his grey existence forever.

programme.title: Bright Young Things
programme.desc: Directed and written by Stephen Fry and based on the novel, Vile Bodies by Evelyn Waugh, BRIGHT YOUNG THINGS is a look at the upper crust British society during the frenzied 1930s. The story follows the lives of a group of young socialites also known as the "Bright Young Things."

programme.title: Ironclad
programme.desc: Set in the 13th century, this tale sees a rag-tag group of knights battle a devious king (Paul Giamatti). James Purefoy, Brian Cox & Kate Mara also star in this action-charged adventure.

programme.title: Their Finest
programme.desc: 1940, London, the Blitz; with the country's morale at stake, Catrin, an untried screenwriter, and a makeshift cast and crew, work under fire to make a film to lift the nation's spirits - and inspire America to join the war. A witty, romantic and moving portrayal of a young woman finding her way, and her voice, in the mayhem of war and the movies!

programme.title: Tommy's Honour
programme.desc: Tom and Tommy Morris, father and son pioneers of professional golf, rely on skill, business acumen, and working-class street smarts to make Tommy one of the world's first sports superstars.

programme.title: Madame Bovary
programme.desc: Adapted from Flaubert's classic novel, this film tells the tragic story of Emma, a young beauty who impulsively marries a small-town doctor to leave her father's pig farm behind. But after being introduced to the glamorous world of high society, she soon becomes bored with her stodgy mate and seeks excitement and status outside the bonds of marriage.

programme.title: Colette
programme.desc: Set at the dawn of the modern age, Colette is the story of a woman who has been long denied her voice going to extraordinary lengths to reclaim it. Gabrielle Sidonie Colette, a young woman from a country village, marries a charismatic dominating Parisian, fourteen years her senior, known by the single name, 'Willy.' Through his auspices, she is introduced to bohemian Paris where her creative appetite is sparked. Ever quick to capitalise on talent, Willy convinces his wife to write novels - to be published under his name. The phenomenal success of her "Claudine" series makes Willy well known as a writer and 'Colette and Willy' the first modern celebrity couple. Over time, lack of recognition for her work frustrates Colette, and an affair with the gender-defying Marquise de Belbeuf inspires her to break free, but Willy is determined to maintain his hold over her, at any cost.

programme.title: Fish Tank
programme.desc: This BAFTA-winning raw drama stars Katie Jarvis in her debut role as Mia, a volatile 15-year-old, who is always in trouble as she has been excluded from school and is ostracised by her friends. When her mother (Kierston Wareing) brings home Connor (Michael Fassbender), a mysterious stranger, a change to their lives looks promising. Trivia: Katie Jarvis lives on an Essex housing estate like the one in the movie, and she was discovered by director Andrea Arnold while in a shouting match with her boyfriend at the Tilbury train station, which is seen in the movie. Now 18, she gave birth to a daughter conceived when she was 16.

programme.title: Route Irish
programme.desc: A security contractor in Iraq rejects the official explanation of his friend's death and decides to investigate.

programme.title: Hurricane
programme.desc: The tale of the Polish pilot who alongside his comrades of the Polish Air Force joins the British Royal Air Force to fight during the Battle of Britain. Having seen Warsaw burn, Poland crumble and France capitulate, the Poles join the Brits to push back the rampant Nazi empire.

programme.title: Tommy's Honour
programme.desc: Tom and Tommy Morris, father and son pioneers of professional golf, rely on skill, business acumen, and working-class street smarts to make Tommy one of the world's first sports superstars.

programme.title: Madame Bovary
programme.desc: Adapted from Flaubert's classic novel, this film tells the tragic story of Emma, a young beauty who impulsively marries a small-town doctor to leave her father's pig farm behind. But after being introduced to the glamorous world of high society, she soon becomes bored with her stodgy mate and seeks excitement and status outside the bonds of marriage.

programme.title: Mr. Turner
programme.desc: This film explores the last quarter century of the great, if eccentric, British painter JMW Turner. Profoundly affected by the death of his father, loved by a housekeeper he takes for granted and occasionally exploits sexually, he forms a close relationship with a seaside landlady with whom he eventually lives incognito with in Chelsea, where he dies. Throughout this, he travels, paints, stays with the country aristocracy, visits brothels, is a popular if anarchic member of the Royal Academy of Arts, has himself strapped to the mast of a ship so that he can paint a snowstorm, and is both celebrated and reviled by the public and by royalty.

programme.title: Fish Tank
programme.desc: This BAFTA-winning raw drama stars Katie Jarvis in her debut role as Mia, a volatile 15-year-old, who is always in trouble as she has been excluded from school and is ostracised by her friends. When her mother (Kierston Wareing) brings home Connor (Michael Fassbender), a mysterious stranger, a change to their lives looks promising. Trivia: Katie Jarvis lives on an Essex housing estate like the one in the movie, and she was discovered by director Andrea Arnold while in a shouting match with her boyfriend at the Tilbury train station, which is seen in the movie. Now 18, she gave birth to a daughter conceived when she was 16.

programme.title: Route Irish
programme.desc: A security contractor in Iraq rejects the official explanation of his friend's death and decides to investigate.

programme.title: Hurricane
programme.desc: The tale of the Polish pilot who alongside his comrades of the Polish Air Force joins the British Royal Air Force to fight during the Battle of Britain. Having seen Warsaw burn, Poland crumble and France capitulate, the Poles join the Brits to push back the rampant Nazi empire.

programme.title: Hope Gap
programme.desc: The intimate, intense and loving story of "Hope Gap" charts the life of Grace, shocked to learn her husband is leaving her for another after 29 years of marriage, and the ensuing emotional fallout the dissolution has on their only grown son. Unravelled and feeling displaced in her small seaside town, Grace ultimately regains her footing and discovers a new, powerful voice.

programme.title: The Dinosaur Project
programme.desc: In this special effects thriller, a film crew in the Congo discover a lost world filled with terrifying, giant creatures thought extinct for millions of years.

programme.title: The Deep Blue Sea
programme.desc: Master chronicler of post-War England, Terence Davies directs Rachel Weisz as a woman whose overpowering love threatens her wellbeing and alienates the men in her life. In a deeply vulnerable performance, Rachel Weisz plays Hester Collyer, the wife of an upper-class judge (Simon Russell Beale) and a free spirit trapped in a passionless marriage. Her encounter with Freddie Page (Tom Hiddleston), a troubled former Royal Air Force pilot, throws her life in turmoil, as their erotic relationship leaves her emotionally stranded and physically isolated.

programme.title: Hyde Park on Hudson
programme.desc: A historical tale that uniquely explores the all-too-human side of one of history's iconic leaders. Blending literate wit and drama, Hyde Park on Hudson is directed by Roger Michell from a screenplay by Richard Nelson. In June 1939, President Franklin Delano Roosevelt readies to host the King and Queen of England for a weekend at the Roosevelt home at Hyde Park on Hudson, in upstate New York - marking the first-ever visit of a reigning British monarch to America. As Britain faces imminent war with Germany, the royals are desperately looking to FDR for U.S. support. But international affairs must be juggled with the complexities of FDR's domestic establishment, as his wife Eleanor, mother Sara, and secretary Missy will all play a part in making the royal weekend an unforgettable one. Seen through the eyes of Daisy, Franklin's neighbour and intimate, the weekend will produce not only a special relationship between two great nations, but, for Daisy - and through her, for us all - a deeper understanding of the mysteries of love and friendship.

programme.title: Into the White
programme.desc: During World War II, enemy fighter pilots find themselves face to face after shooting down one another's planes over a desolate landscape. In order to survive, they must set aside the rules of war.

programme.title: Anna and the Apocalypse
programme.desc: T'was the night before Christmas, when a zombie apocalypse threatened a sleepy town. Anna and her friends must fight, slash, and sing their way to survival.

programme.title: The Secret Scripture
programme.desc: Based on the best selling novel a woman committed to a mental hospital for much of her life, must rely on her diary to recount her memories to a Doctor, who is reassessing her for the move to a new facility.

programme.title: Hope Gap
programme.desc: The intimate, intense and loving story of "Hope Gap" charts the life of Grace, shocked to learn her husband is leaving her for another after 29 years of marriage, and the ensuing emotional fallout the dissolution has on their only grown son. Unravelled and feeling displaced in her small seaside town, Grace ultimately regains her footing and discovers a new, powerful voice.

programme.title: The Descent: Part 2
programme.desc: In this sequel to the critically acclaimed horror hit a dazed, bloodied and speechless Sarah emerges alone from the Appalachian cave system, before being forced back underground to help the rescue team find her missing friends. As the team move deeper into the caves, Sarah's flashes of fractured memory intensify and she begins to realise the full horror of the would-be rescue mission. Only Sarah knows the terror which lurks in the shadows of the caves. They are about to encounter a new tribe of Crawlers, inbred, deformed and even more viciously feral than those Sarah faced before.

programme.title: The Dinosaur Project
programme.desc: In this special effects thriller, a film crew in the Congo discover a lost world filled with terrifying, giant creatures thought extinct for millions of years.

programme.title: Hyde Park on Hudson

programme.title: Into the White
programme.desc: During World War II, enemy fighter pilots find themselves face to face after shooting down one another's planes over a desolate landscape. In order to survive, they must set aside the rules of war.

programme.title: Anna and the Apocalypse
programme.desc: T'was the night before Christmas, when a zombie apocalypse threatened a sleepy town. Anna and her friends must fight, slash, and sing their way to survival.

programme.title: The Secret Scripture
programme.desc: Based on the best selling novel a woman committed to a mental hospital for much of her life, must rely on her diary to recount her memories to a Doctor, who is reassessing her for the move to a new facility.

programme.title: Cheerful Weather for the Wedding
programme.desc: Dolly is in turmoil when her old lover appears on her wedding day. Does she run away with him or choose a humdrum husband? Astute comedy about family foibles.

programme.title: McClaren
programme.desc: The story of Bruce McLaren, the New Zealander who showed the world that a man of humble beginnings could take on the elite of motor racing and win.

programme.title: The Bookshop
programme.desc: Set in a small town in 1959 England, a woman decides, against polite but ruthless local opposition, to open a bookshop, a decision which becomes a political minefield.

programme.title: Belle
programme.desc: This film is inspired by the true story of Dido Elizabeth Belle, the illegitimate mixed race daughter of Admiral Sir John Lindsay. Raised by her aristocratic great-uncle Lord Mansfield and his wife, Belle's lineage affords her certain privileges, yet her status prevents her from the traditions of noble social standing. While her cousin Elizabeth chases suitors for marriage, Belle is left on the sidelines wondering if she will ever find love. After meeting an idealistic young vicar's son bent on changing society, he and Belle help shape Lord Mansfield's role as Lord Chief Justice to end slavery in England.

programme.title: The Limehouse Golem
programme.desc: Victorian London is gripped with fear as a serial killer, dubbed 'The Limehouse Golem', is on the loose and leaving cryptic messages written in his victim's blood. With few leads and increasing public pressure, Scotland Yard assigns the case to Inspector Kildare - a seasoned detective with a troubled past. Faced with a list of suspects, Kildare must discover which one is the killer before the Golem strikes again.

programme.title: The Duke
programme.desc: In 1961, Kempton Bunton, a 60-year-old taxi driver, steals Goya's portrait of the Duke of Wellington from the National Gallery in London. What happened next became the stuff of legend.

programme.title: 44 Inch Chest
programme.desc: Colin (Ray Winstone) is in agony, shattered by his wife's (Joanne Whalley) infidelity. However, he has friends who do more than stand by - they kidnap the wife's French lover and hold him prisoner so that Colin can restore his manhood with revenge. A kangaroo court takes place and as the situation Colin wrestles with remorse, grief and self pity, all the while egged on by his motley crew of friends who just want him to get on with it.

programme.title: Cheerful Weather for the Wedding
programme.desc: Dolly is in turmoil when her old lover appears on her wedding day. Does she run away with him or choose a humdrum husband? Astute comedy about family foibles.

programme.title: On Chesil Beach
programme.desc: Based on Ian McEwan's novel. In 1962 England, a young couple find their idyllic romance colliding with issues of sexual freedom and societal pressure, leading to an awkward and fateful wedding night.

programme.title: The Bookshop
programme.desc: Set in a small town in 1959 England, a woman decides, against polite but ruthless local opposition, to open a bookshop, a decision which becomes a political minefield.

programme.title: Belle

programme.title: Gattaca
programme.desc: A man is labelled an 'In-Valid' because he was conceived not in the lab, but in love, in a future where 'designer people', forged in test tubes, rule society.

programme.title: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: Gabe Walker is a member of the mountain-climbing rescue team. While crossing a ledge 1220m above the Earth, Gabe's friend's equipment fails and she slips out of his hand, falling to her death. Almost a year after, he must return to those dreaded peaks, where he finds himself trapped in a desperate battle against ruthless criminals, unforgiving nature and himself.

programme.title: Back to the Future
programme.desc: Marty McFly, a typical American teenager of the 1980s, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered DeLorean time machine, invented by a slightly mad scientist. During his often hysterical but amazing trip back in time, Marty must make certain his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so that he can get back to the future.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: Axel Foley turns up the heat when the street-wise cop leads sidekick Judge Reinhold on the trail of a weapons kingpin and his leather-clad hit-lady.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: A trio of university parapsychologists lose their research grant and decide to open their own business, Ghostbusters, and almost at once are summoned to investigate the strange happenings in a Central Park West apartment. What they discover is that all Manhattan is being besieged by otherworldly demons.

programme.title: The Jackal
programme.desc: An FBI director works with a Russian agent and a jailed terrorist to hunt down the elusive Jackal, a master-of-disguise assassin on a deadly mission.

programme.title: Gattaca
programme.desc: A man is labelled an 'In-Valid' because he was conceived not in the lab, but in love, in a future where 'designer people', forged in test tubes, rule society.

What they discover is that all Manhattan is being besieged by otherworldly demons.

programme.title: The Jackal
programme.desc: An FBI director works with a Russian agent and a jailed terrorist to hunt down the elusive Jackal, a master-of-disguise assassin on a deadly mission.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The Terminator is now one of the good guys, sent back in time to protect John Connor, the boy destined to lead the freedom fighters of the future. Sarah Connor, John's mother is the quintessential survivor who has been institutionalised for her warning of the nuclear holocaust she knows is inevitable. Together, the threesome must find a way to stop the ultimate enemy - the T-1000, the most lethal Terminator ever created. This visual tour de force is also a touching human story of survival.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: Stranded 205,000 miles from Earth in a crippled spacecraft, astronauts Jim Lovell, Fred Haise and Jack Swigert fight a desperate battle to survive. Meanwhile, at Mission Control, astronaut Ken Mattingly, flight director Gene Kranz and a heroic ground crew race against time - and the odds - to bring them home.

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger
programme.desc: Jack Ryan is called into action when a prominent businessman, who may be connected to Colombian drug cartels, is murdered.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: For the third time, Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to Beverly Hills, this time to track down bad guys at an amusement park.

programme.title: Groundhog Day
programme.desc: Bill Murray is at his wry, wisecracking best in this riotous romantic comedy about a weatherman caught in a personal time warp on the worst day of his life. Teamed with a relentlessly cheerful producer and a smart-aleck cameraman, TV weatherman Phil Connors is sent to Punxsutawney, Pennsylvania, to cover the annual Groundhog Day festivities.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: An eccentric chemistry professor discovers an elixir which turns him into a pop idol.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The Terminator is now one of the good guys, sent back in time to protect John Connor, the boy destined to lead the freedom fighters of the future. Sarah Connor, John's mother is the quintessential survivor who has been institutionalised for her warning of the nuclear holocaust she knows is inevitable. programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III

programme.title: Groundhog Day

Teamed with a relentlessly cheerful producer and a smart-aleck cameraman, TV weatherman Phil Connors is sent to Punxsutawney, Pennsylvania, to cover the annual Groundhog Day festivities.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: An eccentric chemistry professor discovers an elixir which turns him into a pop idol.

programme.title: Robin Hood (2010)
programme.desc: Robin Hood, the legendary figure of 13th century England, who along with his band of marauders confront corruption in the local village of Nottingham and lead an uprising against the crown that will forever alter the balance of world power. Whether regarded as thief or hero, one man from humble beginnings will become an eternal symbol of freedom for his people.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: When detectives Ricardo Tubbs and Sonny Crockett are asked to investigate the brutal murders of two federal agents, they find themselves pulled into the lethal world of drug traffickers.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Two country handymen who lead a cast of zany characters to safety in this exciting sci-fi creature adventure. Just as Val McKee and Earl Basset decide to leave Perfection, Nevada, strange rumblings prevent their departure. With the help of a shapely seismology student, they discover their desolate town is infested with gigantic man-eating creatures that live below the ground. The race is on to overcome these slimy subterraneans and find a way to higher ground.

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
programme.desc: Larger than life, and blessed with a magical sense of serendipity, Ferris Bueller is a model for all those who take themselves too seriously. One spring day, toward the end of his senior year, Ferris (Matthew Broderick) gives in to an overwhelming urge to cut school and head for downtown Chicago with his girl (Mia Sara) and his best friend (Alan Ruck), to see the sights, experience a day of freedom and show that with a little ingenuity, a bit of courage and a red Ferrari, life at 17 can be a joy. Featuring Charlie Sheen and Jennifer Grey, it's of the most iconic films of the 80s, and one of writer/director John Hughes' best.

programme.title: The Breakfast Club
programme.desc: When Saturday detention started, they were the Jock, the Princess, the Brain, the Criminal, and the Basket Case, but by that afternoon they had become closer than any of them could have imagined.

programme.title: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: The story of an all-American girls' professional baseball league formed in 1943 when the men were away at war.

programme.title: Robin Hood (2010)
programme.desc: Robin Hood, the legendary figure of 13th century England, who along with his band of marauders confront corruption in the local village of Nottingham and lead an uprising against the crown that will forever alter the balance of world power. programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: Special Agent Ethan Hunt teams up with the villain's ex-girlfriend to destroy an international conspiracy to sell a deadly virus to the highest bidder.

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: What would you do if you knew that in a handful of days an enormous commit would collide with Earth and all humanity could be annihilated? The countdown to doomsday is underway in this exciting sci-fi action. Oceans will rise, cities will fall and hope will survive. DEEP IMPACT makes its effect felt in a big and unforgettable way.

programme.title: The Jackal
programme.desc: An FBI director works with a Russian agent and a jailed terrorist to hunt down the elusive Jackal, a master-of-disguise assassin on a deadly mission.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: A harrowing war drama where two Black Hawk helicopters are shot down over Mogadishu, trapping an elite team of American soldiers in a 15-hour firefight as they try to recover their fallen comrades.

programme.title: The Game
programme.desc: A hugely entertaining thriller that crackles with electricity and suspense. Wealthy banker Nicholas Van Orton is given a surprise birthday present by his younger brother: a gift certificate for something called 'The Game'. Run by the shadowy Consumer Recreations Services, the Game never quite declares its rules or objectives, but soon Nicholas finds himself in its grasp, and his ordered life starts to fall apart.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: An epic tale, set in the Rocky Mountains of Montana in the early 1900s, of three brothers and their father living in the remote wilderness and how their lives are affected by love, betrayal and brotherhood. After being discharged, Colonel Ludlow decides to raise his three sons in the wilds of Montana, where they can grow up away from the government and society he has learned to despise. As the brothers set out to fight a war in Europe, suspicion and jealousy threatens to tear apart their once indestructible bond when Susanna enters their lives.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: Special Agent Ethan Hunt teams up with the villain's ex-girlfriend to destroy an international conspiracy to sell a deadly virus to the highest bidder.

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: What would you do if you knew that in a handful of days an enormous commit would collide with Earth and all humanity could be annihilated? The countdown to doomsday is underway in this exciting sci-fi action. Oceans will rise, cities will fall and hope will survive. DEEP IMPACT makes its effect felt in a big and unforgettable way.

programme.title: The Jackal
programme.desc: An FBI director works with a Russian agent and a jailed terrorist to hunt down the elusive Jackal, a master-of-disguise assassin on a deadly mission.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The Terminator is now one of the good guys, sent back in time to protect John Connor, the boy destined to lead the freedom fighters of the future. Sarah Connor, John's mother is the quintessential survivor who has been institutionalised for her warning of the nuclear holocaust she knows is inevitable. Together, the threesome must find a way to stop the ultimate enemy - the T-1000, the most lethal Terminator ever created. This visual tour de force is also a touching human story of survival.

programme.title: The Game
programme.desc: A hugely entertaining thriller that crackles with electricity and suspense. Wealthy banker Nicholas Van Orton is given a surprise birthday present by his younger brother: a gift certificate for something called 'The Game'. Run by the shadowy Consumer Recreations Services, the Game never quite declares its rules or objectives, but soon Nicholas finds himself in its grasp, and his ordered life starts to fall apart.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: An epic tale, set in the Rocky Mountains of Montana in the early 1900s, of three brothers and their father living in the remote wilderness and how their lives are affected by love, betrayal and brotherhood. After being discharged, Colonel Ludlow decides to raise his three sons in the wilds of Montana, where they can grow up away from the government and society he has learned to despise. As the brothers set out to fight a war in Europe, suspicion and jealousy threatens to tear apart their once indestructible bond when Susanna enters their lives.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: A tough Detroit cop is treading on toes in posh Beverly Hills whilst trying to track down a killer who murdered his good friend. Foley's not-quite-by-the-book way of doing things doesn't go down well with the local authorities or the bad guys. Detectives Rosewood and Taggart are ordered to follow Foley and ensure he doesn't get in any trouble, but it's Foley who shows them a thing or two about sneaky detective work.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: Axel Foley turns up the heat when the street-wise cop leads sidekick Judge Reinhold on the trail of a weapons kingpin and his leather-clad hit-lady.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: For the third time, Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to Beverly Hills, this time to track down bad guys at an amusement park.

programme.title: Bulletproof
programme.desc: A hilarious saga of a cop, a crook and a beautiful friendship gone sour. Once inseparable pals, Archie Moses and Rock Keats find themselves on opposite sides of the law, each feeling betrayed by the other. In fact, the only person who hates them more than they hate each other is ruthless drug kingpin Frank Colton, who wants to put them both six feet under! Now, through a strange twist of fate, Moses and Keats are on the run - together. With a little luck, the bungling boys just might get out of this one alive ... if they don't kill each other first!

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Thrill-seeking meteorologists are chasing the most destructive tornado in 50 years.

programme.title: First Blood
programme.desc: When a small town police chief arrests a vagrant hitchhiker, little does he know that he has set in motion a catastrophic series of events. The vagrant in question is in fact John Rambo. Rambo makes a daring escape from the small town jail to the shelter of the mountains and prepares himself for a one man war.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (1984)
programme.desc: A new kid in town who is picked on by bullies learns karate and eastern philosophy from Mr Miyagi, and learns how to fight back.
